reviews.review_title: Literally my fav game on the Meta store
reviews.review_description:
Wild Monkehs is amazing and 100% deserves more players. As a player with the content creator badge I can say that if you play it for only like 2 days you can easily take part in the community and just have extreme amounts of fun with everyone who’s online and chatty…

NOW GO DOWNLOAD IT PLSSSSSSS

P.S The owner is an absolute W

Very nice community

Cool game modes

And so much cosmetics


Also PS If you get banned don’t rate this a bad game it’s your fault for breaking the rules :)

It’s a great game gtag fan game where you can play with friends !
There is only up, infection and causal, different maps and cosmetics! I find it really fun to play and the community is great!
Everyone is nice and the staff is amazing!
They are constantly making new updates to help the community and it’s amazing.
So fun to play and really enjoyable!
Very gud game. Made most of my vr ffriends here

reviews.review_title: Wild Monkehs is a decent game
reviews.review_description: this game is GREAT cause at first it was just a boring game just in casual but then it has had one of the most GREATEST glow ups ever in meta history in my opioin

(Read it all ) I hope both of your pillows are warm and your wifi is trash, i can not even describe how bad this game is it's a so boring is almost like it's was made to boring a big scary ripoff not even scary don't download

reviews.review_title: This is why you should download the game
reviews.review_description: This is one of the best games out there it’s really underrated and I think you should check it out the The staff, including me are very nice and I’m a mod and beta tester, so I can comfortably say that this is a really good game ￼
It has a good community, there's horror, and if you don't like horror there is only up and rising lava,and there's a forest map. In all this game is best
THIS GAME IS THE BEST AND SHARK ARMY FOREVER 🦈🦈🦈
This game is one of the best games I ever played. It’s so sigma. The community is great and the game overall is one of the best games in my opinion so I recommend playing it and just fun.￼
The owner is soooooo nice and the community is too. I definitely recommend this game to all of the VR fans. So what are you doing just reading this and go play the game now!🐵
This game is so much fun, scary, nice community, it’s just one of my fav games ever

This game is honestly one of the best games ive ever played just watch out for the jumpscare lol


From gorillacool (:
This game is so W, I met CrazyCats before the game was on meta quest
This game changed my life. It saved my dog from cancer. It cured my Ebola. And inspired me, to become an artist.
